title: After the Japanese Derby: No Plan is the Best Plan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't think! Close your eyes! Just go all out! I've
got thiiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: HAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah, let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer sprints down the track using only
her heart as her compass.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! I won! I cleared my mind, and I
got first!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I wasn't able to do it no matter how hard I
tried back when I thought I had to take
everything super seriously.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But after meeting my bestie and learning how to
goof off and live it up, I've... I've...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! I'm such an idiot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Man, can I be any more awkward? I swear... Ahahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I praise Mejiro Palmer as she laughs through tears.
Even if it wasn't the victory she envisioned, it's a
commendable victory all the same.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Here I thought Ines Fujin would run away with the
win...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I was sure Mejiro Ryan would be the
winner...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I guess some people are shook that a rando
like me won.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say you're a "rando," though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That was impressive, Palmer. You did so well, I
think you deserve a special treat!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So lemme give you an exclusive cheer! To be
honest, I was really hoping to be the one
receiving cheers, but it is what it is.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go! Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pal-mer! Pal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pal-mer! Pal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ines... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pal-mer! Pal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You too, Ryan? Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Thanks! Your cheering might not end up in
Umamusume history...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But I'll remember this forever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, the four of us have a little party to
celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see. ☆ If I run the way Ines did today...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: And my bestie slays the getaway...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What's up, Helios?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. An idea just hit me, and I was tryna
work it out! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's a pretty god-tier plan, but it could also be a
total bust! ♪ But enough of that. C'mon, let's
keep the party going!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let me just shake up this can of soda... ☆ Pop the
tab...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Drop in a couple of Menthos candies and! ★★★
Woohooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa, holy crap! Girl, the soda's spraying
everywhere! Omigo—pffft!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their bubbly after-party to celebrate the Derby
lasts long into the night.
